title: About
text:
Get to Know Me
    About Me
    
      Graduate student, data enthusiast, and aspiring analytics professional.
    
  

  
  

    
    
      
        👩‍💻
      
      Manjari Kannan
      MS Applied Business AnalyticsBoston University
      
        
          🔗 LinkedIn

          Location
          Boston, MA
        
        
          Program
          MS Applied Business Analytics
        
        
          Status
          Open to Work
        
      
    

    
    

      
      
        Professional Introduction
        
          I'm Manjari Kannan — a graduate student at Boston University pursuing a Master's in Applied Business Analytics.
          My academic journey sits at the crossroads of data science, business strategy, and technology,
          and I'm driven by the challenge of making sense of messy, complex data to surface insights
          that genuinely move the needle for organizations.
        
        
          Before Boston University, I developed a strong foundation in quantitative methods and business fundamentals.
          Through coursework and hands-on projects, I've built experience across the full analytics workflow:
          from data wrangling and statistical modeling to visualization and executive storytelling.
        
        
          I'm particularly drawn to problems in marketing analytics, customer behavior, and operational efficiency —
          areas where data and business intuition must work together to find the right answer.
        
      

      
      
        Technical Skills

        
          Programming Languages
          
            Python
            R
            SQL
            DAX
          
        

        
          Libraries & Frameworks
          
            pandas
            NumPy
            scikit-learn
            PySpark
            statsmodels
            matplotlib
            seaborn
          
        

        
          BI & Visualization
          
            Tableau
            Power BI
            Excel
            Plotly
          
        

        
          Cloud & Infrastructure
          
            AWS EC2
            AWS S3
            Git / GitHub
            Quarto
          
        

        
          Methods & Concepts
          
            Machine Learning
            Statistical Modeling
            A/B Testing
            Marketing Mix Modeling
            Predictive Analytics
            Data Storytelling
          
        
      

      
      
        Areas of Interest
        
          
            📈
            
              Marketing Analytics
              Attribution modeling, campaign ROI, and customer lifetime value analysis.
            
          
          
            🤖
            
              Machine Learning
              Supervised learning, model explainability, and turning predictions into decisions.
            
          
          
            📦
            
              Business Strategy
              Translating analytical findings into clear, actionable strategic recommendations.
            
          
          
            ☁️
            
              Cloud & Big Data
              Scalable pipelines and distributed computing for large-scale analytics.
            
          
        
      

      
      
        Career Goals
        
          My goal is to join an analytics or data science team where I can contribute to data-informed
          decision-making across product, marketing, or operations. I'm looking for roles where I can
          grow technically — building and deploying models — while staying close to the business context
          that makes those models matter.
        
        
          Longer-term, I'm interested in analytics leadership: shaping how organizations build
          their data culture, measurement frameworks, and analytical workflows from the ground up.
        
        
          View My CV
          Get in Touch

title: Contact
text:

title: Projects
text:
My Work
    Projects
    
      A collection of data analytics and machine learning projects — each built to solve a real problem.
    
  

  
  
    All
    Machine Learning
    Data Analytics
    Cloud
    Visualization
  

  
  

    
    
      ☁️
      Cloud Analytics Lab on AWS EC2
      
        Provisioned and configured an AWS EC2 instance to run a distributed PySpark environment
        for large-scale data processing. Set up Jupyter notebooks, automated dependency management,
        and demonstrated end-to-end ETL pipelines on real datasets. The lab serves as a reusable
        template for cloud-native analytics work.
      
      
        PySpark
        AWS EC2
        Python
        Jupyter
        Linux/Bash
      
      
        ⬡ GitHub
      
    

    
    
      🤖
      Customer Churn Prediction
      
        Built and compared multiple classification models (Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost)
        to predict customer churn on a telecom dataset. Applied SHAP values for model explainability,
        enabling business teams to understand which features most drive churn — and act on them.
        Final model achieved 87% accuracy with 0.91 AUC-ROC.
      
      
        Python
        scikit-learn
        XGBoost
        SHAP
        pandas
        matplotlib
      
      
        ⬡ GitHub
      
    

    
    
      📊
      Marketing Mix Model
      
        Developed a regression-based marketing mix model to measure and compare the incremental
        revenue contribution of each marketing channel (TV, digital, social, email).
        Used adstock transformations to account for carryover effects. Deliverable included
        an interactive Tableau dashboard for budget optimization scenario analysis.
      
      
        Python
        statsmodels
        NumPy
        Tableau
        Excel
      
      
        ⬡ GitHub
      
    

    
    
      💡
      Sales Performance Dashboard
      
        Designed and built an end-to-end sales analytics pipeline: queried and transformed data
        with SQL, loaded into Python for cleaning and feature engineering, then published
        an interactive Power BI dashboard tracking key metrics (revenue, churn rate, product mix,
        rep performance) with automated weekly refresh.
      
      
        SQL
        Python
        Power BI
        DAX
        pandas
      
      
        ⬡ GitHub
      
    

  

  
  
    
      More projects in progress — check back soon or see my GitHub for the latest.
    
    
      Visit GitHub Profile →
